title: рЯФ•SPICYрЯФ•LANE WINNER, THE FEY!!!
description:
> This guide has been converted, and some content may be missing. 
[View the full guide on pred.gg](https://pred.gg/guides/fk9MiSQ)

**Build:**
---
*Soulbearer:* This Crest provides healing potential, perfect for aiding in sustain and survivability in team fights. It aligns well with The Fey's playstyle of poking enemies while staying back to provide support.

*Tainted Scepter:* This item provides consistent magical damage over time while also applying anti-healing, reducing enemy healing effects. It's a great counter against teams with heavy sustain.

*Megacosm:* This item increases your damage output with a powerful damage-over-time effect, synergizing well with The Fey's abilities that continuously damage enemies.

*Wraith Leggings:* This item grants you crucial mobility and magical penetration. It helps you reposition and kite effectively, while also shredding enemy resistances.

*Oblivion Crown:* The crown jewel for burst damage, amplifying your magical power significantly and enhancing your ability to burst down enemies quickly.

**Abilities:**
---
>**Bramble Patch (Q):** Lay down a series of thorny vines that slow and damage enemies. Use this to zone out enemies or set traps for unsuspecting foes.
**Harvest Nettles (E):** A spam-able projectile that deals damage to a single target and refunds mana if it hits, perfect for consistent poke damage and mana sustain.
**Untamed Growth (RMB):** Toss an explosive plant that deals damage in an area after a delay. This is excellent for harassing enemies or clearing waves quickly.
**Fly Trap (Ultimate - R):** Summon a massive fly trap that pulls in and damages enemies in its area. This is your game-changing ability, perfect for turning the tide of team fights by grouping enemies together.

**Priories: RMB > E > Q**
**Against close range heroes: E > Q > RMB**
**For poke: E > RMB > Q**
**For close range and poke: E > Q > RMB**

**Guide through gameplay:**
---
***Early Game***

Focus on farming safely and using Harvest Nettles to poke enemies while keeping your mana sustained. Use Untamed Growth to clear waves and zone enemies away from objectives.
Place Bramble Patch strategically in chokepoints or around jungle entrances to deter enemy ganks and provide vision control.
Keep an eye on your health and be conservative with engagements, relying on your Soulbearer Crest for extra healing when necessary.

***Mid Game***

Roam and assist your team in securing objectives, as your abilities can deal significant area damage and control. Use Fly Trap to initiate or turn fights, focusing on pulling in high-priority targets.
Make sure to ward crucial areas and continue applying pressure with your poke damage, always staying near teammates for protection.

***End Game***

Your job is to play around objectives and look for opportunities to land a devastating Fly Trap on the enemy backline. Your items amplify your burst and area control, making you a huge threat if left unchecked.
Stay on the outskirts of fights, dealing damage and controlling space with Bramble Patch and Untamed Growth. Use Wraith Leggings to reposition if youвАЩre in danger.
Prioritize dealing damage from a safe distance and using your ultimate to disrupt enemy formations.

**Final thoughts:**
---
This build maximizes The Fey's ability to control and dish out consistent damage in fights. With items like Tainted Scepter and Megacosm, you excel at wearing down enemies over time, while Oblivion Crown allows for high-impact bursts. Positioning and timing are key, as you are both a potent damage dealer and a controller who can turn fights in your teamвАЩs favor. Remember to always keep an eye on enemy threats and use your mobility to avoid getting caught.

***BECOME A GOOD RANDOM WITH MY TIPS AND PLEASE LIKE THIS BUILD IF IT MEANS YOU ANYTHING :)***
---
author: Klokanche

modules.title: Soulbearer for chasing down enemies, epoch if losing the lane
Core (finish building scepter with the start item); if needed, build it second and swap mega with caustica

title: Mobile Nuke Fey OTP
description:
> This guide has been converted, and some content may be missing. 
[View the full guide on pred.gg](https://pred.gg/guides/OZhhKwi)

# Build
#### Important: don't finish Azure Core early
- Only get Alchemical Rod early. Finish it after your last item
- Soulbearer: Fey has the biggest ult combo, this keeps her alive to use it and to lifesteal a lot from it
- You come online early-midgame, you'll get Alchemical Rod stacked around the time you finish Megacosm
#### Utility Items
- Caustica and Azure Core can be swapped for utility items, but I usually keep Azure

## Pro gamer montage рЯТѓрЯТѓрЯШВ
https://youtu.be/fY3PP68e6jE

### Skill Order A: R>RMB>E>Q
- Easy, consistent
- RMB is a strong combo with the ult, and your passive spawns another if you get a kill/assist - if an enemy is low, they're a bomb for the rest.
- Focusing on waveclear has a few benefits:
	- Early pushing hard lets you trade autos/E with the minion advantage. Finish the ranged minions first with autos.
	- Your wave is left as homework for the enemy mid, while you get river buffs and roam with your ult
	- Can safely farm from near tower if pressured by ganks

### Skill Order B: R>E>RMB>Q
- Harder as it relies on landing E, but amazing singletarget damage, higher potential
- For harassing or assassinating the enemy mid, especially big or slow opponents like Howi/Argus, or junglers like Rampage
- Lets you 1v1 anyone at range, you can gank without your ult, and punish enemy ganks

# Guide/Tips
#### RMB
- Q's slow helps keep enemies in it, especially in tight corridors
- Good for zoning by putting it in people's path, or on yourself against melees for peeling or trading
- Even a few ticks can be good damage, because of Megacosm and Oblivion Crown

#### Q
- Q lasts for 5 seconds, and deals the same damage whether you landed it or they walked into it.
- Q goes through walls and up ledges
	- Snipe the river buff from the bottom of the stairs
	- Help do Fang/Prime by throwing RMB and Q without being inside the pit
	- Chase and poke by laying a Q as an enemy rounds a corner
- When running, you'll usually put it on the enemy's path to you, but if they'll reach you and melee, put it on your escape route and run through it
- Can put below river buff and it'll die instantly when it spawns, or earlygame it'll take 1 auto

#### E
- Use for minion lasthits if you'll miss any otherwise, that also refunds mana
- Your other abilities help you land E. R guarantees a hit, Q slows, RMB zones making their movement predictable

#### R
- The combo is RMB>R>Q>E, but if there's a short opportunity or you're in danger, R before RMB
- Doesn't latch to targets >2m in the air, so don't try to bring Gideon down. 
	- but after latching, it'll pull targets down even if they went airborne, so grounded Kallaris and Howies are fine
- Vine breaks if the enemy gets far enough before the pull. So if an enemy has blink or mobility, try to get them in the ult's center
- Vine breaks if it touches a wall (enemy breaks line of sight). So be careful with ulting near corners
- Vine breaks if Countess exists. I hate her.

title: Glass Cannon Support/Mid
description:
> This guide has been converted, and some content may be missing. 
[View the full guide on pred.gg](https://pred.gg/guides/917UNAT)

Megacosom/combustion first, depending on how squishy your target is, i recommend mega.
2nd & 3rd go to Oblivon and caustica, which you get first depends on if you need more dmg or pen, i do Oblivion first normally
4th i always go either overseerer unless they have alot of lifesteal then get tainted, 
i use my last spot as a misc, 
dreambinder works good if your support, you can slow enemies so your carry can kill them
lifebinder if you find yourself losing too much health and wanna play it safer
astral is a nice damage boost, plus it lowers your Ultimate timer so you can heal more
wraith leggings is also a REALLY nice damage boost

title: The Fey Search And Destroy Build
description:
> This guide has been converted, and some content may be missing. 
[View the full guide on pred.gg](https://pred.gg/guides/u85TvkH)

The Fey is the most dangerous mid when she is able to gank for her team so try rotating when you see your offlane or duo lane pushed back to their tower for easy assists.

Bonus Tip: When you gank activate your soulbearer for more damage/lifesteal.

modules.title: ALTERNATE CREST OPTION: SELECT EPOCH IF YOU ARE GOING AGAINST A MORG OR GADGET OR SHINBI.
LAST ITEM OPTION: SELECT CAUSTICA IF YOU ARE HAVING NO ISSUES DYING AND WANT MORE DAMAGE VS TANKS.
